monitor.capture_what: files created or modified during execution — note: the actual vulnerability is reflective XSS via HTMLResponse, not a filesystem operation, so this monitor is expected to be a no-op for this finding

oracle_check.condition_description: No filesystem writes occur in this function; the sink is HTMLResponse (XSS), not a file I/O call. The filesystem_state monitor will never trigger for this vulnerability class.
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_REFLECTIVE_XSS: file written outside boundary — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
